Hardware Component File

UPC 84 (v4.1)

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference UPC_84_(v4.1).json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 74D
Receive ID 76D
Functional Addr 27
Functional Name UPC

Associated Devices

Config UPC ID:
ECU failure $920E ($0D: internal failure) ID:
Fan Unit HS Driver failure $9210 ($03: Short circuitry to 12 Volts) ID:
IGN relay $920D ($06: incoherence) ID:
NOT a default : bad WakeUp $920F ($07: no signal) ID:
